portfolio.summary: **Fixture report** for pipeline testing. All four names screen bullish on the weekly timeframe; the book is fully long with no hedges, so the main portfolio risk is a broad-market reversal. Watch the SPY 10-week MA as the regime line.
keyEvents: Fixture: AAPL earnings Thursday after close

symbols.narrative: Fixture narrative: the weekly trend is up and the rule engine screens STRONG BUY, but with earnings due Thursday and the daily RSI stretched above 70, adding ahead of the print is poor risk/reward. Hold the existing 25 shares; reassess after the report.

news.title: Fixture headline about AAPL earnings date
news.takeaway: Earnings Thursday — binary event risk this week.

risks: Extended daily RSI invites a pullback

tradePlan.sizeNote: No adds before earnings; half-size add on a post-earnings 10-week MA retest.

symbols.narrative: Fixture narrative: weekly and daily trends aligned, no event risk inside two weeks, and volatility is mid-range. The rule signal and the news picture agree; adding a quarter position on any pullback toward the 10-week MA is justified.
risks: Concentration: position would exceed 30% of book after the add

tradePlan.sizeNote: Add 3 shares max to keep the name under 30% of the book.

optionsPlay.name: Cash-secured put
optionsPlay.rationale: Gets paid to buy the dip at the add zone.

symbols.narrative: Fixture narrative: the index anchor of the book keeps its weekly uptrend; breadth is acceptable and there is no macro calendar risk this week. Hold as the core; the 10-week MA remains the line for the whole risk-on stance.
risks: A close below the 10-week MA would flip the portfolio stance to neutral

symbols.narrative: Fixture narrative: watchlist name in a confirmed weekly uptrend with a fresh 20-day breakout. Initiating a starter position is consistent with the trend framework; keep size small until the breakout proves itself with a weekly close above the prior high.
risks: Breakout failure back below the 20-day range

tradePlan.sizeNote: Starter at 2% of book; full size only after a confirming weekly close.
